default.title: Nordic Entrepreneur Forum Rød — The Business Bridge
default.description: The working bridge between Norwegian industry and the high-growth economies of Eastern Europe and China. Networking, branding, digitalization and cybersecurity for industrial growth.
default.ogDescription: The working bridge between Norwegian industry and the high-growth economies of Eastern Europe and China.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: How Nordic Entrepreneur Forum collects, uses, and protects personal data shared through this site and during corridor engagements.

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: Terms governing use of the Nordic Entrepreneur Forum website and forum services.

JsonLd.orgDescription: The working bridge between Norwegian industry and the high-growth economies of Eastern Europe and China.
JsonLd.websiteDescription: The working bridge between Norwegian industry and the high-growth economies of Eastern Europe and China.

Header.logoAria: NEFrød — Nordic Entrepreneur Forum Rød, home

Hero.titleStart: The gateway for Nordic industry into
Hero.subtitle: A working bridge between Norwegian enterprise and the high-growth markets of Eastern Europe and China — in both directions.

About.body: Nordic Entrepreneur Forum Rød is the point of dialogue between Norwegian enterprise and the markets it depends on — from Romania, Moldova and the Balkans to China. We work in both directions: Nordic companies reaching into Asia, and Chinese capital landing in Norway. We don't host conferences. We close deals.

founders.title: Entrepreneurs & startups
founders.body: Establishing a footprint in the Nordic market — funding, grants, joint projects.

operators.title: Established enterprises
operators.body: Cross-border expansion, import / export pipelines, maritime trade routes and full digital transformation.

capital.title: Investors & industrial specialists
capital.body: Vetted joint ventures and high-value projects across Energy, Maritime, Logistics and Tech.

feature.title: Networking, workshops & the rooms where deals close.
feature.body: Curated introductions, working sessions, platform promotion and business consulting that turn contacts into commercial outcomes — not LinkedIn followers.
feature.ctaAria: Scope a project — networking and workshops

branding.title: Branding, marketing & web.
branding.body: Identity, communications strategy and digital presence built to read as credible across every market.

digital.title: Digitalization & cybersecurity.
digital.body: Transformation, cybersecurity and digitalization for oil & gas operations — resilient as you scale internationally.

Services.caption: Full-service agency support for companies building their footprint in Norway and abroad. Engagements scoped per project, not per retainer.

Members.titleAccent: deal flow, capital and the corridor.
Members.eligibility: Open to entrepreneurs, established companies and professionals working across — or planning to enter — the Nordic, Eastern European and Chinese markets.

partners.title: Partners & collaborators
partners.body: Warm introductions to operators, suppliers and counterparts — Norway, Eastern Europe, the Balkans and China.

capital.title: Capital & funding
capital.body: Investor pipelines, grant programmes and joint-venture pairing across the corridor.

corridor.title: Corridor access
corridor.body: Direct routes into the Nordic↔Eastern Europe↔China trade lanes, with the people who actually run them.

visibility.title: Platform visibility
visibility.body: Promotion on the Forum platform, in member-only briefings and inside curated programming.

sessions.title: Working sessions
sessions.body: Workshops, corridor briefings and deal-room introductions — practical, not panel-discussion.

advisory.title: Advisory desk
advisory.body: A direct line to specialists in shipping, energy, digital, brand and compliance.

Contact.titleStart: Tell us where you want to
Contact.body: Tell us about your venture and the markets you are targeting. A Forum lead will respond within two business days with an introduction or a corridor assessment.

fields.name: Full name
fields.messagePlaceholder: A few lines on your venture, sector and timeline.

errors.name: Please enter your name.
errors.server: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network: We could not reach the server. Please check your connection and try again.

ContactForm.disclaimer: All fields required. No obligation. We sign an NDA before the first call on request.

success.title: Your request is on its way.
success.body: Thank you — a Nordic Entrepreneur Forum Rød lead will be in touch within two business days with an initial corridor assessment.

Footer.blurb: A business, networking and collaboration platform bridging Nordic innovation with Eastern Europe, China and global markets.
Footer.tagline: Sandnes · Bridging Nordic, Eastern Europe & China

whoWeAre.heading: Who we are
whoWeAre.body: Nordic Entrepreneur Forum (org. 933 270 998) operates this site from Sandnes, Norway. Questions about this notice can be sent via the <link>contact form</link>.

whatWeCollect.heading: What we collect
whatWeCollect.body: When you contact the forum desk we receive the name, company, email, target corridor, and message you submit. We also log standard request metadata — timestamp, user agent, and approximate region — to operate the site and detect abuse.

howWeUse.heading: How we use it
items: To respond to your enquiry with a corridor assessment or introduction.
To maintain a record of the engagement if you become a member of the forum.
To keep the site operational and protect it from misuse.

sharing.heading: Sharing
sharing.body: We do not sell personal data. We share enquiry details with a forum lead relevant to the corridor you indicate, and with subprocessors that provide hosting and email delivery on our behalf. Where a referral requires it, we may share your contact details with a vetted partner — only with your written consent.

retention.heading: Retention
retention.body: We retain enquiry records for three years from last contact unless you ask us to delete them earlier. Member engagement records are retained as long as required by Norwegian accounting law.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: Under GDPR you may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data, and you may lodge a complaint with Datatilsynet. Submit a request via the <link>contact form</link> and we will respond within thirty days.

cookies.heading: Cookies
cookies.body: This site does not set tracking cookies. We use only the minimum functional storage required to render the page.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance
acceptance.body: By using this site or engaging the forum desk you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the site or submit an enquiry.

forumServices.heading: Forum services
forumServices.body: Nordic Entrepreneur Forum offers introductions, working sessions, branding, marketing, web, digitalization, and cybersecurity advisory services. Each engagement is scoped in a separate written agreement that prevails over these site terms.

useOfSite.heading: Use of the site
items: You may view and share links to the site for non-commercial purposes.
You may not scrape, mirror, or republish content without written permission.
You may not submit false information or impersonate another party.

ip.heading: Intellectual property
ip.body: All trademarks, text, code, and visual assets on this site are the property of Nordic Entrepreneur Forum or its licensors. The forum mark and the Nordic red accent are protected and may not be reproduced without consent.

confidentiality.heading: Confidentiality
confidentiality.body: We treat information you submit as confidential. On request, we will sign a mutual NDA before the first scoping call.

noWarranty.heading: No warranty
noWarranty.body: This site is provided as is. Content is for informational purposes and does not constitute legal, tax, or investment advice. We make no representation about the accuracy or completeness of third-party information surfaced through the forum.

liability.heading: Liability
liability.body: To the extent permitted by Norwegian law, our aggregate liability for any claim arising from use of this site is limited to one hundred Norwegian kroner. This limitation does not apply to liability that cannot be excluded by law.

governingLaw.heading: Governing law
governingLaw.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Norway. Disputes are subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Stavanger.

NotFound.body: The link you followed does not lead anywhere we publish. Try the forum home, or reach the desk directly.
